name: author packet dramatic handoff demotes procedural residue

source.purpose: Regression coverage for Ch2+ Author packet salience. Beacon/corridor residue should render as a background constraint in the dramatic handoff, not become the seed objective or crucible.

turns.playerInput: I take the cargo and leave.
turns.narratorProse: The crew clears the berth hold and enters the beacon corridor approach.

faction_vantabloc.name: Vantabloc Freight
faction_vantabloc.description: A Corporate Bloc freight office that prices route access as obligation.
faction_vantabloc.agenda: Turn emergency route access into leverage over independent crews.
faction_vantabloc.leverage: Controls buyer introductions and corridor paperwork.
faction_vantabloc.fear: Independent crews learn to bypass its freight desk.
faction_vantabloc.retrievalCue: Vantabloc freight terms, buyer leverage, corridor paperwork

keyFacts: Crew broker who knows the route buyer.

agenda.pursuing: Keep the crew moving without revealing who can collect from her.
agenda.currentMove: Keep Vantabloc pressure pointed away from herself.

thread_beacon_window.title: The Window That Won't Wait
thread_beacon_window.question: Who controls the route once the crew enters the corridor?
thread_beacon_window.resolutionCriteria: The crew enters the corridor entry point while the first beacon window is still navigable.
thread_beacon_window.failureMode: Delay collapses the window; the corridor becomes unnavigable without override codes.
thread_beacon_window.retrievalCue: beacon window, corridor geometry, Vantabloc route leverage

sceneSummaries.summary: The crew undocked and approached the beacon corridor entry with 13 hours left.

priorChapterMeaning.situation: The crew got free by accepting Vantabloc corridor terms.
priorChapterMeaning.tension: Freedom from the berth became obligation to the route owner.
priorChapterMeaning.ticking: The beacon corridor window tightened while undocking finished.
priorChapterMeaning.question: Who controls the route once the Driftrunner enters the corridor?
priorChapterMeaning.closer: Ossuary falls behind while the first beacon blinks ahead.

transitionSeed.priorChapterMeant: The crew bought freedom from Ossuary by accepting Vantabloc's route terms.
transitionSeed.earnedConsequence: Vantabloc can shift pressure from station hold to corridor run.
transitionSeed.worsenedDetail: Beacon window countdown and corridor geometry constraint
transitionSeed.unresolvedQuestion: Who controls the route once the Driftrunner enters the corridor?

procedureResidue.mechanism: Beacon window countdown and corridor geometry constraint

hookPremiseIncludes: Who pays now: faction_vantabloc pays first
Live constraint: Beacon window countdown and corridor geometry constraint stays background.
Forbidden restages: berth hold clearing, loading sequence, undocking clearance
authorSituationIncludes: Live constraint: Beacon window countdown and corridor geometry constraint stays background.
